analysis.reasoning: Core message: A factual update that Lavrov spoke with Turkmenistan’s FM about bilateral cooperation and preparations for a CA5+Russia foreign ministers’ meeting. Evaluation: RU1 (West immoral/hostile) – not present; no mention of the West. RU2 (Russia leads an alternative system) – implied: highlighting CA5+Russia format underscores non-Western, multilateral cooperation outside Western frameworks, consistent with showcasing alternative multilateral formats. RU3 (Russia benevolent partner) – partially aligned: the tweet frames routine diplomatic cooperation/preparations, portraying Russia as a constructive partner, but without explicit benevolence claims; still, the cooperative tone supports RU3 moderately. RU4 (history admirable) – not relevant. RU5 (world’s forefront) – no achievements cited. RU6 (culture/nature) – not relevant. Conclusion: RU2 and RU3 apply.
